_researchNotes: Happy-path The Knot lead notification. Sender domain evidence: The Knot Pro support ('Why Am I Not Receiving The Knot Emails?', vendorsupport.theknotpro.com) and Releventful's lead-forwarding doc (help.releventful.com/en/articles/10058259) both list member.theknot.com, partner.theknot.com and theknot.com as the domains lead inquiry emails arrive from. Subject: Planning Pod's capture doc (planningpod.com/help-center/capturing-leads-from-the-knot-wedding-wire) calls these the 'New Lead' emails. Field set evidence: WeddingPro blog confirms leads carry wedding date + guest count; bookmorebrides.com/triple-the-knot-responses confirms a phone number is included; Releventful confirms first name + email are present and that an 'Event Details' section plus the couple's initial message are in the body; Mailparser's 'The Knot Lead Management Templates' page confirms couple names, dates and venue/location details. Exact line labels are reconstructed (not published verbatim anywhere public) - parser therefore accepts label aliases.
subject: New lead from The Knot: Olivia is interested in Demo DJ Co.
textBody:
Hi Demo DJ Co.,

You have a new lead from The Knot! Couples usually book the vendor who responds first, so reply quickly.

Olivia Martinez is interested in your services for her wedding.

Event Details
Wedding date: 10/17/2026
Number of guests: 125
Location: The Juniper Loft, Austin, TX

Message:
"Hi! We're getting married on October 17, 2026 at The Juniper Loft and are looking for a DJ who can also MC. Your reviews looked great. Are you available, and what do your packages start at?"

Contact Information
Name: Olivia Martinez
Email: olivia.martinez1017@example.com
Phone: (512) 555-0147

Reply now: https://pros.theknot.com/inbox/leads/12345678

The Knot Pro | This email was sent to you because you have an active storefront on The Knot.
